snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: macOS-first Home Global Default switcher exact-candidate review
reviewers.independence: UI Design owned and accepted the exact frozen nine-path renderer candidate; Development independently audited the existing typed adapters without changing those bytes. Planning reviewed only owner wording, evidence projection and unchanged statuses.

dimensions.summary: The Home UI owner now locates the accessible Global Default switcher, while the existing Pi and Settings owners retain model registry, runtime and durable authority.
Owners agree that Home changes the machine-local Global Default for new calls, never a per-turn routing role, and preserves fail-closed Send plus capture-only behavior.
One exact Home model-switcher selector projects to PIGE-PI-002, PIGE-UI-003 and their existing exits; semantic lock v3 has 1,214 claims and every status remains unchanged.
The M-level slice reuses one summary, one setDefaultModel adapter and sequenced runtime status; the next integrated freeze owns broader test and package verification.
No document or decision is added; one Home owner subsection and one evidence selector keep the synchronization inside existing governed budgets.

verification.evidence: The exact combined candidate passes docs, decisions, UI visual, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate focused and macOS UI evidence
verification.evidence: Development reran 4 files/106 tests, typecheck and build; UI Design supplied macOS Electron evidence and accepted exact 0a557acb/f4f864f8 UI identities.

verification.command: npm run verify:ui-visual && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The visual contract passes; semantic lock v3/1,214 and CON-001 through CON-004 pass with Requirement, Exit and Phase states unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass within the fixed entry, trace and governed Markdown budgets.

coordination.taskTitle: Home Global Default model switcher integration
coordination.compatibility: The candidate adds a Home surface over existing typed models.summary, models.setDefaultModel and agent.runtimeStatus ownership; no IPC, schema, dependency, Job, routing role, permission, secret or durable change.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze and independently audited exact 0a557acb/f4f864f8 bytes after UI Design accepted them. Planning bound only the Home owner, acceptance evidence, semantic lock and this recipe without changing the nine paths.

nonBlockingRisks: The next integrated freeze is the complete full-test, verify and macOS arm64 package/downloaded-distribution node; M-level evidence intentionally avoids repeating those gates here.
Windows visual qualification remains deferred under macOS-first sequencing and is not claimed by this renderer-only slice.
Provider catalog/help, deletion, DeepSeek Anthropic and packaged BYOK remain open; the Home control adds no routing role or provider taxonomy.
